summary: Completed backend and frontend testing for RutaPerfecta travel planner. Backend API structure is correct, frontend form and error handling work properly. CRITICAL: Gemini API key returns 403 PERMISSION_DENIED - third-party API access issue.

critical.issue: Gemini API returns 403 PERMISSION_DENIED - API key has been denied access by Google
critical.error_message: Your project has been denied access. Please contact support.

minor.issue: Fixed malformed .env file - CORS_ORIGINS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY were on same line

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace Gemini API key - current key (AIzaSyDDqWLiI3IFPSnzP7yLJoszB9XjkRBxt7U) returns 403 PERMISSION_DENIED from Google
Verify new API key has Gemini API enabled in Google Cloud Console
Ensure billing is enabled on the Google Cloud project
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is correct - no mock/fallback data in codebase
Error handling works correctly - returns 500 with error message when Gemini fails
Frontend gracefully handles API errors showing 'No encontramos viajes' message
All required fields validated properly (budget minimum 100€, required fields check)

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed - API structure correct, Gemini integration blocked by invalid API key)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (form, loading state, error handling all work correctly)

test_credentials: None required - no auth in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gemini API key is invalid (403 PERMISSION_DENIED). Once a valid API key is provided, retest the search functionality to verify dynamic trip generation. No mock/fallback data exists in code - this is correct per requirements.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Gemini API key (AIzaSyDDqWLiI3IFPSnzP7yLJoszB9XjkRBxt7U) has been denied access by Google Cloud
rca_of_the_issue.error_message: Your project has been denied access. Please contact support.
reproduction_steps: 1. Fill search form with any valid data
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Replace API key with a valid Gemini API key that has proper permissions and billing enabled

verified_requirements.no_mock_data: VERIFIED - No Lisboa/Praga hardcoded, no fallback functions in code
verified_requirements.error_on_gemini_failure: VERIFIED - Returns HTTP 500 with error message when Gemini fails
verified_requirements.form_sends_4_params: VERIFIED - departureCity, startDate, endDate, budget all sent correctly
verified_requirements.loading_state: VERIFIED - 'Buscando con IA...' toast appears during search
verified_requirements.placeholder_without_search: VERIFIED - Shows 'Tus viajes aparecerán aquí' before any search
